description: This table contains data on New Customer Acquisitions, capturing every subscription as soon as it becomes active on the network.

columns.description: Full calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD hh-mm-ss format)
Month extracted from the date (numeric value from 1 to 12)
Day of the month (numeric value from 1 to 31)
Month extracted from the date (numeric value from 1 to 12)
Represents the actual observed value for the specific KPI. The unit of measure is dynamic and determined by the KPI definition (e.g., amount, volume, or headcount).
Year extracted from the date (4-digit format, e.g., 2026)
The Segment column defines the broad category or profile of the customer
The Split column is a more granular sub-division. It provides technical, product-specific, or channel-related details about how the service is delivered or sold
KPI Names

description: This table stores monthly billing data (Billed Revenue). It tracks the total revenue (excluding VAT) generated by subscriptions and usage, categorized by Segment (B2C, B2B) and Technology or offer (Fiber, ADSL, Mobile)
